reference: I was recently hospitalized in an emergency because I felt like I was choking and couldn't breathe. I coded and they had me on oxygen. They did a chest X-ray and said I had pneumonia. I stayed in the hospital for four days. They also said I had Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease and sleep apnea. During my stay, they said my heart stopped and my lungs filled with fluid. Could this be congestive heart failure?
text: I was recently hospitalized in an emergency because I felt like I was choking and couldn't breathe. I coded, and they had me on oxygen. They did a chest X-ray and said I had pneumonia. I stayed in the hospital for 4 days. They also said I had chronic obstructive pulmonary disease and sleep apnea. During my stay, they said my heart stopped and my lungs filled with fluid. Could this be congestive heart failure?
